{"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/19240940?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/ak2k/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/ak2k/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/ak2k/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/ak2k/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/ak2k", "id": 19240940, "login": "ak2k", "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjE5MjQwOTQw", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/ak2k/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/ak2k/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/ak2k/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/ak2k/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/ak2k/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/ak2k", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-47722", "cvss": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 8.7, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:N/PR:L/UI:N/VC:H/VI:H/VA:H/SC:N/SI:N/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-94", "name": "Improper Control of Generation of Code ('Code Injection')"}], "description": "`internal/configgen/generator.go:86,108,119` interpolates the operator-supplied `ListenHost` and `TunDevice` fields raw into a `text/template` that produces the agent's `config.yml`. `internal/web/advanced.go:20-35` accepts both with only `strings.TrimSpace` — no character or shape validation.

## Exploit
An operator (or attacker with any operator key, given the cross-tenant CRUD advisory) sets `adv_tun_device` to:

```
nebula0
lighthouse:
  am_lighthouse: true
  hosts: ["10.0.0.1"]
#
```

The agent fetches the rendered config on its next signed poll. On config reload, it loads the injected YAML keys: the host self-promotes to lighthouse, attracts mesh traffic, or sets `am_relay: true` to be selected as a relay. The `ListenHost` field has the same shape.

## Affected
All released versions prior to v0.3.2.

## Threat model
- **Today**: operator can compromise their own host's config (trivially allowed if they own the host, but they can also set lighthouse/relay flags that the operator-create form does NOT expose — privilege uplift within their own tenant).
- **Combined with the critical /api/v1 authz advisory**: any operator key can mutate ANOTHER tenant's host overrides and inject YAML there.
- **Post-fix of the authz advisory**: still relevant — the agent unconditionally trusts whatever config the server hands it, so any future operator-impersonation bug re-amplifies this.

## Suggested fix
Two options, either acceptable:

1. **Input validation** in `parseAdvancedFromForm` (`internal/web/advanced.go`):
   - `ListenHost`: regex `^[A-Za-z0-9.:\[\]_-]+$` (IPv4/IPv6/hostname)
   - `TunDevice`: regex `^[A-Za-z0-9_-]{1,15}$` (Linux IFNAMSIZ caps at 15)
   Reject invalid input with a form-level error; do not write to the host row.

2. **Safer marshalling**: switch `configgen/generator.go` to marshal a typed Go struct via `gopkg.in/yaml.v3` (which escapes correctly) instead of `text/template` string-concat. Larger change, but eliminates this entire injection class.

Option 2 is preferable long-term. Option 1 is the quick fix.

The `unsafe_routes` advanced field is already `netip.Parse{Prefix,Addr}`-validated at `enroll.go:226-233` — apply the same validation discipline to the other advanced fields.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00052, "percentile": 0.16923}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-7hp6-g3pq-3pc3", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-06-08T23:08:15Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-7hp6-g3pq-3pc3", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-7hp6-g3pq-3pc3"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-47722"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-06-08T23:08:15Z", "references": ["https://github.com/juev/nebula-mesh/security/advisories/GHSA-7hp6-g3pq-3pc3", "https://github.com/forgekeep/nebula-mesh/issues/126", "https://github.com/forgekeep/nebula-mesh/commit/c1506f7344ab375a145a7449b193af3f19bb41ef", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-7hp6-g3pq-3pc3"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/forgekeep/nebula-mesh/security-advisories/GHSA-7hp6-g3pq-3pc3", "severity": "high", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/juev/nebula-mesh", "summary": "nebula-mesh: Host advanced overrides allow YAML injection into agent config.yml", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-08T23:08:18Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-7hp6-g3pq-3pc3", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "0.3.2", "package": {"ecosystem": "go", "name": "github.com/juev/nebula-mesh"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 0.3.2"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: nebula-mesh: Host advanced overrides allow YAML injection into agent config.yml
